vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.0: ComputerCraft is a mod adds programmable computers
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.1: CC-Bridge block can connect Cimulink circuits to ComputerCraft computers
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.2: It can read and write values to/from circuits
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.3: You can use Lua language to program the computer
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.4: Find CC Bridge peripheral by calling: peripheral.find("cc_link_bridge")
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.5: Call setInput(index, value) to set input values
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.6: Call getOutput(index) to get output values
vscontrolcraft.ponder.ccBridge.text.7: Index can not be greater than 7 or lower than 0
